data.title: Fusion and Intensification
data.summary: A conjunction blends two planetary principles into a single intensified field. It amplifies the planets involved and can feel natural, powerful, excessive, or difficult to separate.
energetic_dynamics_json: separation between the planets is reduced
growth_patterns_json: learn to consciously direct the intensified energy
dos_json: explain that the quality depends on the planets
emphasize intensity rather than automatic positivity or negativity
donts_json: do not call every conjunction harmonious
do not interpret it without the planets involved
do not confuse fusion with ease
prompt_hints_json: Describe how the two planetary principles become difficult to separate.
data.micro_note: The conjunction is contextual: it magnifies whatever it touches.

data.title: Opportunity and Cooperation
data.summary: A sextile creates a supportive connection that opens possibilities. It is constructive and helpful, but usually requires conscious participation to become fully active.
dos_json: show how the person can activate it
keep the tone supportive but not passive
donts_json: do not overstate it as automatic success
do not make it as strong as a trine or conjunction
prompt_hints_json: Mention that conscious engagement is needed.
data.micro_note: The sextile is a door; it still needs to be opened.

data.title: Friction and Activation
data.summary: A square creates tension between two planetary principles. It often manifests as pressure, conflict, urgency or frustration, but it also generates movement, effort and growth.
energetic_dynamics_json: two functions push against each other
donts_json: do not call it simply negative
do not ignore its productive force
do not soften it so much that the tension disappears
prompt_hints_json: Explain the challenge and the development opportunity.
data.micro_note: The square is difficult, but it is one of the strongest engines of growth.

data.title: Flow and Integration
data.summary: A trine indicates natural ease between two planetary principles. It supports talent, fluidity and integration, though it can become passive if not consciously used.
dos_json: connect the flow to concrete expression
donts_json: do not imply guaranteed success
do not ignore effort
do not make it purely spiritual without practical expression
prompt_hints_json: Add a note about conscious use.
data.micro_note: The trine shows what flows naturally, but flow still needs direction.

data.title: Polarity and Awareness
data.summary: An opposition places two planetary principles across from each other. It creates polarity, tension, projection and awareness through contrast, often requiring balance and integration.
energetic_dynamics_json: energy seeks balance across an axis
growth_patterns_json: own both sides of the polarity
donts_json: do not reduce it to conflict only
do not ignore the relational dimension
do not treat one side as good and the other as bad
prompt_hints_json: Use language of dialogue and integration.
data.micro_note: The opposition reveals what must be balanced, owned and integrated.

data.title: Subtle Adjustment
data.summary: A semi-sextile links adjacent principles that are close but not naturally aligned. It indicates small adaptations, emerging awareness and subtle developmental friction.
energetic_dynamics_json: the planets are near but not fully compatible
donts_json: do not interpret it like a sextile
do not make it a major life driver alone
data.micro_note: The semi-sextile is minor but useful for fine-tuning.

data.title: Minor Friction
data.summary: A semi-square creates low-grade tension. It is less forceful than a square, but can produce irritation, restlessness and recurring pressure that asks for adjustment.
energetic_dynamics_json: pressure builds in a minor but noticeable way
donts_json: do not treat it as a full square
do not ignore its cumulative effect
data.micro_note: The semi-square is small pressure that becomes useful when noticed early.

data.title: Creative Patterning
data.summary: A quintile suggests creative intelligence, talent, design, craft and the ability to shape experience intentionally. It is subtle but highly expressive when cultivated.
dos_json: describe the talent as needing cultivation
donts_json: do not overstate it as destiny
do not make it purely artistic if the planets suggest another field
prompt_hints_json: Mention talent, craft and intentional expression.
Connect it to the planets involved.
data.micro_note: The quintile points to cultivated talent and creative order.

data.title: Accumulated Tension
data.summary: A sesquiquadrate indicates indirect or accumulated tension. It can feel like repeated pressure, frustration or unresolved stress that pushes for correction.
energetic_dynamics_json: energy seeks correction through repeated signals
friction is less obvious than a square
donts_json: do not make it stronger than a square
do not ignore its persistence
data.micro_note: The sesquiquadrate shows pressure that has been building indirectly.

data.title: Incongruent Adjustment
data.summary: A quincunx links planetary principles that do not naturally understand each other. It often requires adaptation, recalibration and practical adjustment without easy integration.
energetic_dynamics_json: the planets do not easily see each other
resolution is indirect rather than confrontational
dos_json: mention practical and bodily signals when relevant
donts_json: do not interpret it as an opposition
do not promise easy integration
do not ignore the discomfort
prompt_hints_json: Explain that the planets need recalibration.
Use language of adaptation, not direct conflict.
data.micro_note: The quincunx is not a clean conflict; it is a mismatch that asks for adjustment.

data.title: Refined Creative Expression
data.summary: A biquintile is a subtle creative harmonic. It suggests refinement, symbolic intelligence, design ability and the capacity to shape talent into a distinctive form.
donts_json: do not overinflate the aspect
do not ignore the need for practice
prompt_hints_json: Mention design, craft and symbolic intelligence.
data.micro_note: The biquintile refines the creative impulse of the quintile.

data.title: Symbolic Compulsion
data.summary: A septile is an advanced symbolic aspect associated with inner necessity, unusual timing, subtle compulsion and experiences that feel meaningful or fated.
energetic_dynamics_json: the connection is subtle and non-rational
dos_json: avoid making it central unless strongly supported
donts_json: do not present it as certain fate
do not overuse it in mainstream readings
data.micro_note: The septile should remain subtle and contextual in public interpretations.

data.title: Deep Symbolic Resonance
data.summary: A biseptile extends the septile family, indicating subtle symbolic pressure, unusual resonance and a sense of meaningful inner movement.
energetic_dynamics_json: the aspect is subtle and interpretively delicate
dos_json: make it secondary to major aspects
donts_json: do not make it a deterministic claim
do not overstate its public relevance
data.micro_note: The biseptile is meaningful but should be handled with restraint.

data.title: Intensified Symbolic Pattern
data.summary: A triseptile belongs to the septile family and points to intensified symbolic patterning, subtle compulsion and inner movements that may feel charged with meaning.
energetic_dynamics_json: energy becomes charged through symbolic meaning
the connection is subtle but psychologically intense
conflict_patterns_json: becoming psychologically captured by a pattern
donts_json: do not make it central without corroboration
do not claim literal fate
data.micro_note: The triseptile is advanced and should not dominate a reading alone.

data.title: Inner Completion
data.summary: A novile suggests inner integration, maturation and subtle spiritual development. It often points to a quiet process of completion rather than visible outer pressure.
energetic_dynamics_json: the aspect is quiet and developmental
completion is more internal than external
growth_patterns_json: make inner integration visible when needed
donts_json: do not treat it like a major external trigger
do not overstate its visibility
data.micro_note: The novile is subtle, inward and developmental.

data.title: Deepening Inner Integration
data.summary: A binovile extends the novile family, suggesting a deepening process of inner alignment, spiritual maturation and quiet synthesis.
energetic_dynamics_json: development is subtle and largely internal
dos_json: connect inner development to lived choices
donts_json: do not overemphasize it in public V1 readings
do not make it more visible than major aspects
data.micro_note: The binovile deepens the inner completion theme of the novile.

data.title: Culminating Inner Synthesis
data.summary: A quadranovile suggests a culminating phase of inner integration. It points to subtle completion, spiritual synthesis and the quiet consolidation of experience.
energetic_dynamics_json: the aspect is subtle, reflective and mature
conflict_patterns_json: believing the process is complete too early
donts_json: do not dramatize it
do not treat it as a major external event
data.micro_note: The quadranovile points to quiet culmination rather than obvious external action.

data.title: Creative Ordering
data.summary: A decile is a subtle creative harmonic linked to order, proportion, intelligent design and the ability to structure talent into useful form.
donts_json: do not treat it as a major driver
do not make creativity purely artistic
data.micro_note: The decile gives form and order to creative intelligence.

data.title: Specialized Creative Intelligence
data.summary: A tredecile suggests specialized creative intelligence, unusual skill and the ability to combine inspiration with structured expression.
energetic_dynamics_json: creative order is expressed in a distinctive way
donts_json: do not use deterministic genius language
do not ignore the need for discipline
data.micro_note: The tredecile is a subtle marker of distinctive creative skill.

data.title: Intense Focus and Fixation
data.summary: A quindecile suggests intense focus, compulsion, obsession or deep concentration. It can create extraordinary persistence, but also fixation if unconscious.
energetic_dynamics_json: focus can become powerful or compulsive
donts_json: do not use alarmist language
do not ignore the constructive potential
do not make it the whole chart
prompt_hints_json: Interpret as intense focus or fixation.
Balance constructive persistence with shadow risk.
data.micro_note: The quindecile can become mastery or obsession depending on consciousness.
